name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Proline Adult Dog Food Canned Beef Chunks inGravy 415g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully balanced all-natural wet dog food with beef protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs.
description: Proline Adult Dog Food Canned - Beef Chunks in Gravy , fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein...................................... 6.5% Fat ............................................ 3.5% Crude Ash .....................................2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber).................. 0.3% Moisture............................................82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% beef), cereals, minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
